patch.value: Item-directory fan-out: bucketed storage layout behind format_version gating with a lossless migration

Filesystem-physics child of pm-9rxu: directories with 100k+ entries degrade badly on most filesystems and in git status. Explicitly blocked on the ADR because the bucket scheme is a one-way door. Duplicate check: pm-ae1u introduced format_version gating (closed) — this builds on it, does not duplicate it.

Storage layout supports bucketed subdirectories per ADR pm-bl8x scheme; migration command converts existing flat layouts losslessly (history chains, files links, extensions intact; validate + health green before/after); old layout keeps working read-only until migrated; format_version gates new layout; git history stays diffable per item
